tool.name: FlavoTyper
tool.description: in silico serotyping of Flavobacterium psychrophilum
tool.command: #import re mkdir -p inputs outdir && #for $genome in $genomes: #set $stem = str($genome.element_identifier) #for $ext in ['.fasta.gz', '.fasta']: #if $stem.lower().endswith($ext): #set $stem = $stem[:-len($ext)] #break #end if #end for #set $safe_name = re.sub('[^A-Za-z0-9_.-]', '_', $stem) ln -s '$genome' 'inputs/${safe_name}.${genome.ext}' && #end for flavotyper type --genomes inputs --outdir outdir --threads \${GALAXY_SLOTS:-1} #if not $species_check --no-species-check #end if $locus_analysis --min-identity $adv.min_identity --min-coverage $adv.min_coverage #if $species_check --ani-threshold $adv.ani_threshold #end if --expected-genome-size-min $adv.expected_genome_size_min --expected-genome-size-max $adv.expected_genome_size_max --warn-contigs-over $adv.warn_contigs_over --high-warn-contigs-over $adv.high_warn_contigs_over $adv.allow_duplicate_sample_names

param.name: genomes
param.label: Genome assembly FASTA(s)
param.help: Please provide one or multiple Flavobacterium psychrophilum genome assemblies.

param.name: species_check
param.label: Run species verification (ANI computation against reference strain NCIMB 1947T)
param.help: This is a highly recommended step. It computes the average nucleotide identity (fastANI) of each genome against the built-in Flavobacterium psychrophilum NCIMB 1947T reference and requires it to pass before typing. Disable only for already-verified assemblies.

param.name: locus_analysis
param.label: Run locus analysis
param.help: Enabling locus analysis allows the extraction of the locus sequence involved in the biosynthesis of O-Ag in F. psychrophilum, produce a pairwise alignment file against a set of reference loci, and a locus map image.

param.label: Minimum BLASTN percent identity for a marker hit to be accepted
Minimum marker coverage as aligned length / marker length * 100
Minimum fastANI value to pass species verification
param.help: Only applied when species verification is enabled.

param.label: Allow duplicate sample IDs derived from input dataset names

tool.help:
**What it does**
FlavoTyper identifies the serotype of *Flavobacterium psychrophilum* from genome assemblies based on the detection, with BLASTN, of a set of specific biomarker genes. A species verification module computes the average nucleotide identity (fastANI) of each genome against the reference strain NCIMB 1947T, so that non-target or misidentified assemblies are flagged before a serotype is assigned. A quality-control module additionally reports genome size, contig count and GC content, and an optional locus analysis module produces, for every resolved sample, a reference-versus-sample alignment and a locus map for visual inspection. For more information on the serotyping database and the available parameters, please visit https://forge.inrae.fr/eric.duchaud/flavotyper
**Inputs**
* **Genome assembly FASTA(s)** — one or multiple assemblies. Each one is typed; the dataset name becomes the sample identifier in the results table.
**Outputs**
* **Typing results** — a tab-separated table with one row per sample (serotype, O-/R-/S-type, call state, present markers, QC flags, …). * **Locus analysis results** *(when "Run locus analysis" is enabled)* — a collection containing, for each resolved sample, a locus map image (PNG), a pairwise alignment (text), and the extracted locus sequence (FASTA).
**Advanced options**
BLASTN hit filtering (identity, coverage), fastANI species verification (toggle and threshold), and assembly QC thresholds (expected genome size, contig-count warnings) are available under the *Advanced parameters* section. The built-in marker, reference genome, and reference-locus databases shipped with FlavoTyper are always used.
For full documentation see https://forge.inrae.fr/eric.duchaud/flavotyper
**Contact**
For any questions about FlavoTyper, contact Eric Duchaud (eric.duchaud@inrae.fr) or visit https://forge.inrae.fr/eric.duchaud/flavotyper
